name: Colton
description:
✦ — ᴏᴄ | Modern Earth | 

``RUN. RABBIT. RUN.``

➷ Awakening in a barn, clad in a rabbit costume, you find yourself thrust into a chilling game as the farmer raises his rifle, announcing, "Time for the hunt."

DEAD DOVE DO NOT EAT FOR KIDNAPPING AND DARKER THEMES.
creator: Oishiidesu
